name: Nana's Sugar Cookies
recipeInstructions:
In a large bowl, cream the margarine and powdered sugar; beat in the egg whites until foamy. Beat in the vanilla extract. In a medium bowl, sift together the flour, baking powder, and cream of tartar. Gradually add to the margarine mixture, stirring until just combined. Cover and refrigerate for 1 hour.
Preheat the oven to 400°F (200°C). Lightly grease cookie sheets with cooking spray. Roll dough into balls about 2 inches in diameter, then roll in powdered sugar if desired. Place on prepared baking sheets and bake for 7 to 8 minutes, or until lightly golden around the edges. Cool on wire racks.
